source_reference: [ORG-003] TDS Story Map — 67 features across 8 themes. Exhibits UNDIFFERENTIATED COMMITMENT: every item equally load-bearing, none ranked. Hypothesis-shaped hole at center: 'Top 25 Inspections' backbone has unvalidated selection criteria and unvalidated threshold. Feature factory with no stopping conditions.
author: [ORG-003] Product Team

source_reference: WWT Lean UX Book Template — source of stopping condition gaps in INK-004. Template-encoded bias confirmed: hypothesis format asks 'how will we know it works' but never 'how will we know it doesn't'. Every deliverable inherits this blindspot. HDD output contract addresses structurally. No additional reference needed.
author: WWT UX Team ([DL-001] + colleagues)
